title: HomeCanvas AI turns your 2D floor plan into a 3D home you can walk through.
problem: Your future home starts as a flat PDF. Lines and numbers. You squint and try to imagine your life inside.
trace: Upload your plan. Set the scale from one known dimension. Then trace walls, rooms, doors, and windows with snap assist. Your 3D home builds live beside you as you draw.
canvas3d: Now step inside. Orbit, walk in first person, or take a guided tour, room by room. Real light and soft shadows make it feel like a place.
edit: Click any room. Make it yours. Swap floors and walls. 12 style packs, from Indian Modern to Rajasthani Heritage. Add furniture that fits. Move the stairs. Delete a pillar. The app warns about stability first.
ai: Just ask. Type add a sofa to the lounge, or 3 variants of the master bedroom. The assistant shows a preview. Nothing changes until you approve. It even works offline.
photo: Found a view you love? Open Photo Mode. A path tracer refines it sample by sample, until it looks almost like a photograph. Save it as a PNG.
privacy: Everything runs on your computer. No accounts, no uploads, no paid APIs. Nothing leaves your machine. Your home stays your business.
outro: HomeCanvas AI. Clone it, type npm run dev, and meet your future home.
